channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pieter Coetzé wins double backstroke gold as Corbett secures two bronzes at China Swimming Open
item.description: South Africa's rising swimming star Pieter Coetzé continues his impressive trajectory on the international stage after claiming two gold medals at the China Swimming Open in Shenzhen. The 20-year-old ...

item.title: Gulf Investors and African Markets Converge to Form New Economic Growth Engine Amid Middle East Tensions

item.title: Ontario Doctor Shares Practical Tips to Prevent Childhood Poisoning
item.description: An Ontario-based physician is advising parents on measures to prevent accidental poisonings among children, highlighting that such incidents remain a significant health concern. The doctor emphasizes ...

item.title: Ways to stay healthy and save money on healthcare in Nigeria
item.description: As the International Women’s Day (IWD) celebrations fade, Nigeria's healthcare system remains in crisis. While organizations provided free healthcare services to women, such as medical screenings and ...

item.title: Gauteng Health acts to recover R4.6 billion in unpaid patient fees as finances tighten
item.description: The Gauteng Department of Health is ramping up its bid to recover approximately R4.6 billion in unpaid patient fees amid significant financial strain across South Africa’s public health sector. Accord...

item.title: European countries and Canada urge Israel to curb settler attacks against Palestinians in West Bank
item.description: Diplomats from thirteen European nations and Canada have strongly condemned the spike in violence carried out by Israeli settlers against Palestinians in the occupied West Bank. The joint statement, r...

item.title: Nigeria's Renaissance Energy aims to double oil production by 2030
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy Company, under the leadership of CEO Tony Attah, has unveiled bold plans to more than double Nigeria's oil output by 2030. With a strategic pivot towards local expertise and ...

item.title: KZN Public Works stresses the importance of upholding laws to protect schools and communities
item.description: In this opinion piece, Martin Meyer, MEC for the KwaZulu-Natal Department of Public Works and Infrastructure, explains why laws and regulations are essential to maintaining social order, particularly ...

item.title: England set to face Australia in Canberra, PM's XI match still uncertain
item.description: Cricket Australia has confirmed that Manuka Oval in Canberra will host two major Twenty20 matches next summer, with Australia facing England on December 2 and Australia’s women’s team competing agains...

item.title: Beatrice and Edoardo Mapelli Mozzi’s marriage faces pressure amid Andrew controversy
item.description: Princess Beatrice's marriage to Edoardo Mapelli Mozzi is reportedly under strain. The tension is believed to have been exacerbated during the period when the Epstein scandal involving Beatrice's fathe...

item.title: US Military to Integrate Palantir's AI for Enhanced Warfare Strategy
item.description: In a major shift for US military strategy, the Pentagon is set to officially adopt Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system as a core part of its operational framework. The decision was made of...

item.title: Iran retaliates against Trump, warns of further attacks on strategic targets
item.description: In a heated exchange between Iran and the United States, Iran has responded strongly to former President Donald Trump's recent comments regarding its government. In a public statement, Iranian officia...

item.title: Everton secure decisive win over Chelsea as Rosenior admits defensive woes
item.description: Everton delivered a commanding performance at the Hill Dickinson Stadium, defeating Chelsea 3–0 in a Premier League clash that further exposed the visitors’ defensive frailties. Beto was the standout ...

item.title: Three People, Including Musician, Killed in Katsina Community Clashes
item.description: A serious wahala happen for Katsina metropolis as multiple violent incidents happen between Friday and Saturday, wey lead to the death of at least three people and injury to several others. The areas ...

item.title: Middle East unrest disrupts supply for Persian-focused grocery store
item.description: A Persian-focused grocery store is struggling to maintain its supply of goods due to ongoing instability in the Middle East. The store owner reported significant difficulties in securing essential pro...

item.title: Experts warn UK currently dependent on US and European defences against potential Iranian missile threat
item.description: A report by the Daily Mail reveals that Britain has no independent defences capable of intercepting Iranian ballistic missiles following Tehran’s attempted strike on the jointly operated US–UK base at...

item.title: Rep. Ruben Gallego Discusses Reenergizing the Democratic Party’s Message and Appeal
item.description: In a recent interview with Politico, Congressman Ruben Gallego of Arizona spoke about his mission to reinvigorate the Democratic Party’s image and connect more effectively with voters across the count...

item.title: Indian student describes safe return from Gulf conflict amid Iran war tensions
item.description: An Indian student studying in Iran has recounted his narrow escape from the Gulf region as tensions escalated due to an ongoing conflict. The student, who was pursuing higher studies in Tehran, descri...

item.title: Jun Robles Lana reflects on the significance and message of his film ‘Sisa’
item.description: Filipino filmmaker Jun Robles Lana, one of the country's most respected directors, spoke about why his latest movie, Sisa, is an important addition to Philippine cinema. The film reimagines the tragic...

item.title: Leaked Audio Alleges Police Involvement in Illegal Arms Trade and Prolonged Detention of Ex-Corper Nnamdi Emeh
item.description: One leaked audio been show plenty wahala inside Nigeria Police Force matter involving one former NYSC member, Nnamdi Daniel Emeh. For the conversation wey leak between one woman wey dem call Princess ...
